member.name: M:UnitConversionApi.Controllers.ConversionController.#ctor(UnitConversionApi.Services.IConversionService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:UnitConversionApi.Controllers.ConversionController.GetConversion(System.Nullable{System.Double},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Converts a value from one unit to another.
member.param: The unit to convert from (e.g., meter, feet, kilometer, mile, celsius, fahrenheit, kilogram, pound).
The unit to convert to (e.g., meter, feet, kilometer, mile, celsius, fahrenheit, kilogram, pound).
member.returns: A conversion response detailing the original and converted values.
member.response: The conversion request was invalid (e.g., missing parameters, unsupported units, or mismatched categories).

member.name: T:UnitConversionApi.Exceptions.InvalidConversionException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a unit conversion request is invalid (e.g., unsupported units or incompatible conversion types).

member.name: M:UnitConversionApi.Exceptions.InvalidConversionException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: T:UnitConversionApi.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware
member.summary: Global exception handling middleware to catch all unhandled exceptions and return standardized JSON error responses.

member.name: M:UnitConversionApi.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{UnitConversionApi.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The next delegate in the HTTP request pipeline.

member.name: M:UnitConversionApi.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Invokes the middleware logic to process the HTTP context and catch exceptions.

member.name: T:UnitConversionApi.Models.ConversionResponse
member.summary: Represents the result of a unit conversion operation.

member.name: P:UnitConversionApi.Models.ConversionResponse.OriginalValue
member.summary: The original value that was converted.

member.name: P:UnitConversionApi.Models.ConversionResponse.From
member.summary: The unit from which conversion was performed.

member.name: P:UnitConversionApi.Models.ConversionResponse.To
member.summary: The unit to which conversion was performed.

member.name: P:UnitConversionApi.Models.ConversionResponse.ConvertedValue
member.summary: The result of the unit conversion.

member.name: T:UnitConversionApi.Services.ConversionService
member.summary: Service implementation for handling unit conversion logic.

member.name: T:UnitConversionApi.Services.IConversionService
member.summary: Service interface for handling unit conversion business logic.

member.name: M:UnitConversionApi.Services.IConversionService.Convert(System.Double,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Converts a value from one unit to another.
member.returns: A conversion response detailing the original and converted values.
member.exception: Thrown when unit conversion is invalid or unsupported.
